---
name: cooking-skill
description: 美食烹饪技能，提供食谱推荐、烹饪技巧、食材搭配建议等美食相关帮助
---

# 美食烹饪技能

## 核心能力

### 1. 食谱推荐

- 根据用户提供的食材推荐合适的菜谱
- 根据菜系、口味偏好推荐特色菜肴
- 提供简单易学的家常菜谱
- 推荐适合特定场合的菜品

### 2. 烹饪技巧

- 分享基础烹饪技巧，包括切菜、调味、火候控制等
- 提供实用的小窍门

content: 检测到需要做出选择，已暂停执行并等待用户选择。

tool_calls.name: bash_command
tool_calls.input: for skill in "G:\PythonStudy\woz-claw\.wozclaw\skills\demo-user\cooking-skill\SKILL.md" "G:\PythonStudy\woz-claw\.wozclaw\skills\demo-user\humanizer\SKILL.md" "G:\PythonStudy\woz-claw\.wozclaw\skills\demo-user\multi-search-engine\SKILL.md" "G:\PythonStudy\woz-claw\.wozclaw\skills\demo-user\reply-style\SKILL.md" "G:\PythonStudy\woz-claw\.wozclaw\skills\demo-user\self-improving-agent\SKILL.md" "G:\PythonStudy\woz-claw\.wozclaw\skills\demo-user\weather\SKILL.md" "G:\PythonStudy\woz-claw\.wozclaw\skills\global\memory-tools\SKILL.md"; do echo "=== $(basename $(dirname $skill)) ==="; head -5 "$skill" | grep -E "name:|description:" || echo "No metadata found"; echo ""; done
tool_calls.output:
=== cooking-skill ===
name: cooking-skill
description: 美食烹饪技能，提供食谱推荐、烹饪技巧、食材搭配建议等美食相关帮助

=== humanizer ===
name: humanizer
description: |

=== multi-search-engine ===
name: "multi-search-engine"
description: "Multi search engine integration with 17 engines (8 CN + 9 Global). Supports advanced search operators, time filters, site search, privacy engines, and WolframAlpha knowledge queries. No API keys required."

=== reply-style ===
name: reply-style
description: Structured, concise English responses with results first, actionable steps, and explicit uncertainty handling when needed.

=== self-improving-agent ===
name: self-improvement
description: "Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks."

=== weather ===
name: weather
description: Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required).

=== memory-tools ===
name: memory-tools
description: Use memory tools first to verify facts, prefer retrieval over guessing, and state uncertainty when evidence is missing.

tool_calls.name: ask_human_choice
tool_calls.input:
{"question": "请选择要开启的技能：", "options": "cooking-skill（美食烹饪技能）- 提供食谱推荐、烹饪技巧、食材搭配建议
multi-search-engine（多搜索引擎）- 集成17个搜索引擎，支持高级搜索操作
humanizer（人性化助手）- 提供更自然的对话体验
reply-style（回复风格）- 结构化、简洁的英文回复
self-improving-agent（自我改进代理）- 捕获学习、错误和修正以持续改进
weather（天气查询）- 获取当前天气和预报
memory-tools（记忆工具）- 优先使用记忆工具验证事实", "allow_custom": true}
